text: Alright, wrapping up for the day. Let me review what we accomplished.
Balthasar's PR is looking solid. Circuit breaker pattern is in, tests at 96 percent.
The Friar Lawrence review went well. He approved the unified gateway architecture.
Juliet confirmed sub-millisecond schema bridge performance. That is our key demo metric.
Rosaline's investor prep was useful. Prince Escalus cares about the unified gateway angle most.
The board observer call with Escalus went well. He is cautiously optimistic about the Verona Platform.
Main risk is still Tybalt. If Capulet Industries approves his competing proposal, this gets complicated.
Need to get the staging demo ready before the next board meeting. That gives us about four days.
Tomorrow I should focus on the API compatibility matrix. Capulet's schemas are more complex than expected.
Also need to be smarter about the commit history. Benvolio is getting suspicious.
Overall a productive day though. The Verona Platform is coming together.
Signing off. Time to prep that staging environment.
